display.purpose: Login hero and brand surface headlines. One per screen maximum. Playfair Display 700.

headline.purpose: Page-level title (lt-page-title). Anchors the current section. One per view.

title.purpose: Topbar section label, card titles. Sub-section anchors. Always Playfair.

body.purpose: All prose, table cells, form values. Inter 400. Max 65-75ch on reading surfaces.

label.purpose: Table column headers, nav section dividers, badge text, stat card labels. Inter 600, uppercase, tracked.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Resting cards and stat cards. Lifts white surface off ivory page.

shadows.name: topbar-position
shadows.purpose: Sticky topbar. Signals fixed layer above scrolling content.

shadows.name: button-lift
shadows.purpose: Primary navy button hover. Confirms interactivity.

shadows.name: button-gold-lift
shadows.purpose: Gold button hover. Same role as button-lift, gold-tinted.

shadows.name: brand-glow
shadows.purpose: Login panel brand icon only. Ceremonial; does not transfer.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (button hover, nav active, card lift).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Instant feedback: hover color changes, active states.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for most interactive elements.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar collapses to off-canvas, main has no left margin, login right panel goes full-width.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Navy background, white text, lifts on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg> Lưu thay đổi</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 9px 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f1c2e, #1a2d45); color: #fefefe; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(15,28,46,0.25); white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(15,28,46,0.35); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9a84c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Highest-priority CTA. Gold background, navy text. Use sparingly — one per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 9px 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c9a84c, #e2c97e); color: #0f1c2e; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(201,168,76,0.3); white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(201,168,76,0.45); transform: translateY(-1px); color: #0f1c2e; } .ds-btn-gold:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f1c2e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent background, border at rest. Navy border on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 9px 20px; background: transparent; color: #4b5563; border: 1.5px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #0f1c2e; color: #0f1c2e; background: #f5ecd1; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9a84c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. White surface on ivory page. Subtle ambient shadow.
components.html:
Danh sách học sinh

Nội dung thẻ hiển thị ở đây.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fefefe; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { padding: 18px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f1c2e; margin: 0; } .ds-card-action { background: none; border: none; color: #c9a84c; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; font-family: inherit; } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input. Gold focus ring marks interaction. 1.5px border at rest.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-label { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; color: #374151; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #111827; background: #fefefe; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #c9a84c; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(201,168,76,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Soft-tinted pill for categorical status labels. Color is supplementary — always paired with text.
components.html: Có mặtVắng mặtĐi trễGiáo viênThông báo
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.03em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-success { background: rgba(39,174,96,0.1); color: #16a34a; } .ds-badge-danger { background: rgba(231,76,60,0.1); color: #dc2626; } .ds-badge-warning { background: rgba(243,156,18,0.12); color: #d97706; } .ds-badge-gold { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15); color: #92620a; } .ds-badge-info { background: rgba(41,128,185,0.1); color: #1d4ed8; } .ds-badge-navy { background: rgba(15,28,46,0.08); color: #0f1c2e; } .ds-badge-gray { background: #f3f4f6; color: #6b7280; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Navy shell, gold active state with structural 3px left indicator.
components.html:
HỌC VỤ
Lớp học Học sinh Điểm danh QR
components.css: .ds-nav-section-label { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); padding: 12px 20px 4px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 20px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); position: relative; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #ffffff; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-nav-item-active { color: #c9a84c; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.12); } .ds-nav-item-active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 3px; background: #c9a84c; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard metric display. Icon block + value + label. Lifts on hover. Not a hero-metric template.
components.html:
248
HỌC SINH
components.css: .ds-stat { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 20px 24px; background: #fefefe; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-stat:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-stat-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-stat-icon-gold { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.12); color: #c9a84c; } .ds-stat-icon-navy { background: rgba(15,28,46,0.08); color: #0f1c2e; } .ds-stat-icon-success { background: rgba(39,174,96,0.1); color: #27ae60; } .ds-stat-icon-danger { background: rgba(231,76,60,0.1); color: #e74c3c; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 1.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f1c2e; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #9ca3af; margin-top: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: QR Attendance Box
components.description: High-stakes attendance moment. Navy-bordered frame, countdown timer that turns red when expiring.
components.html:
QR CODE
08:42

Mã QR sẽ hết hạn sau
components.css: .ds-qr-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 16px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-qr-box { background: #fefefe; border: 3px solid #0f1c2e; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; display: inline-block; } .ds-qr-timer { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f1c2e; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-qr-timer.expiring { color: #e74c3c; animation: ds-pulse 1s infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:.5} } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-qr-timer.expiring { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview:
A school register is an authoritative object: precise columns, institutional typography, a physical weight that signals seriousness. Every entry in it matters. Lumina Tutors' design system draws from this metaphor — a premium professional tool that carries the composure of an institution that has been trusted with real students and real accountability. The deep navy and restrained gold are ink and seal, not brand spray. Playfair Display headings land on the screen with the same gravity they would on an official certificate.

This is not a product that wants to look modern. It wants to look correct. The ivory content surfaces feel like quality paper; the navy sidebar feels like the binding of a serious book. Gold marks what matters (active states, primary call-to-action, the brand mark) and is used nowhere else. The system earns trust through consistency and precision, not through personality gestures.

The design explicitly rejects: generic SaaS bootstrapped dashboards with white backgrounds and blue primary buttons that could belong to any product; playful edtech aesthetics with gamification, bright primary colors, or Duolingo-style illustration; enterprise-grey SharePoint energy with no visual identity; neon dark fintech interfaces that belong to a trading platform, not a school.
keyCharacteristics: Deep navy structural shell surrounding warm ivory content surfaces
Gold used at strict rarity: active navigation, primary CTA, brand mark only
Serif display typeface (Playfair Display) for all headings; neutral sans-serif (Inter) for everything else
Flat surfaces by default; depth appears only as a response to interaction or hierarchy
Vietnamese-first: formal institutional tone, not startup-casual
Role-differentiated density: teacher workflows are quick and tactical; accountant workflows are data-dense

rules.name: The Gold Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Honor Roll Gold appears on active navigation items, the brand mark, and the primary gold button variant. It does not appear on decorative elements, section headings, body text emphasis, or any surface not directly actionable or identity-bearing.

rules.name: The Two-Surface Rule
rules.body: Content lives on Record Page White cards. The page itself is Exam Paper Ivory. The sidebar is Headmaster's Navy. Three surface levels, no more. Nesting a white card inside another white card collapses the hierarchy.

rules.name: The Playfair Discipline Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display is used exclusively for headings. It does not appear in body copy, table cells, labels, badges, or navigation items. Every Playfair occurrence on a screen must correspond to a named hierarchy level.

rules.name: The Scale Ratio Rule
rules.body: Adjacent heading steps must have at least a 1.25 ratio. A flat scale where all headings are the same size defeats the register metaphor.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only in response to state (hover, sticky position, modal overlay). Decorative box-shadows on decorative elements are prohibited. If an element is not interactive and not positionally fixed, it does not have a shadow beyond the card ambient minimum.

dos: Do use Playfair Display for all heading levels and nothing else.
Do keep Honor Roll Gold to active navigation states, the brand mark, and the gold button variant.
Do use the Two-Surface Rule: Ivory page, White card, Navy sidebar.
Do use status badges (soft-tinted pills) for all categorical labels.
Do apply WCAG AA contrast to all text (4.5:1 for body text).
Do pair color-coded status indicators with a text label or icon — never color alone.
Do write Vietnamese copy as formal institutional prose.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: skip entrance animations and the QR timer pulse.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS bootstrapped dashboard with white background and blue primary buttons.
Don't use playful edtech aesthetics: bright primary colors, gamification badges, illustrated characters.
Don't produce enterprise-grey SharePoint energy: dense grey forms, no typographic hierarchy.
Don't use neon dark fintech aesthetics: dark backgrounds with cyan, green, or purple neon accents.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Emphasis through weight, scale, or color.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as decorative accents on cards or callouts.
Don't place a white card inside another white card.
Don't use Honor Roll Gold on body text, decorative dividers, or section headings.
Don't use the hero-metric template: big number on a gradient card.
